languages.text: {n}Наконец, Эоганн касается юного пустотнорожденного.{/n} "Микош, ползатель-наладчик вентиляционных шахт десятого сортировочного. Он добросовестно сжигал слизнеплесень и паразитов, первым лез в заблокированные шахты, рискуя жизнью, ради того, чтобы переработанный воздух поступал в сектор. Он искренне верил и никогда не роптал на свою долю. В последнюю вылазку он спас сотни рабочих, заткнув свои телом дыру в трубе с горючим газом. Отравление вызвало остановку сердца и заражение крови".

{n}Finally, Eogunn touches the voidborn youth.{/n} "Mikosh, a ventilation shaft crawler from Sorting Hub 10. He dutifully burned mouldslime and vermin, and would be the first to climb into blocked ducts, risking his life to deliver recycled air into the sector. He was a true believer and never lamented his lot. On his final foray, he saved hundreds of workers by using his body to plug a hole in a combustible gas pipe. The toxicity led to cardiac arrest and blood poisoning."
languages.original_text: {n}Наконец, Эоганн касается юного пустотнорожденного.{/n} "Микош, ползатель-наладчик вентиляционных шахт десятого сортировочного. Он добросовестно сжигал слизнеплесень и паразитов, первым лез в заблокированные шахты, рискуя жизнью, ради того, чтобы переработанный воздух поступал в сектор. Он искренне верил и никогда не роптал на свою долю. В последнюю вылазку он спас сотни рабочих, заткнув свои телом дыру в трубе с горючим газом. Отравление вызвало остановку сердца и заражение крови".

He was a true believer and never lamented his lot. On his final foray, he saved hundreds of workers by using his body to plug a hole in a combustible gas pipe. The toxicity led to cardiac arrest and blood poisoning."

He dutifully burned void polyps and vermin, and would be the first to climb into blocked ducts, risking his life to deliver recycled air into the sector. The toxicity led to cardiac arrest and blood poisoning."

He dutifully burned void polyps and vermin, and would be the first to climb into blocked ducts, risking his life to deliver recycled air into the sector. He was a true believer and never lamented his lot. On his final foray, he saved hundreds of workers by using his body to plug a hole in a combustible gas pipe. The toxicity led to cardiac arrest and blood poisoning."

He dutifully burned mouldslime and vermin, and would be the first to climb into blocked ducts, risking his life to deliver recycled air into the sector. He was a true believer and never lamented his lot. On his final foray, he saved hundreds of workers by using his body to plug a hole in a combustible gas pipe. The toxicity led to cardiac arrest and blood poisoning."

languages.text: {n}最後に、エオガンは虚空の生まれた青年に触れる。{/n}「ミコシュ、ソートハブ10の換気口の掃除人。彼は虚空のポリプや害虫を忠実に焼いて、詰まったダクトに真っ先に登り、命を危険にさらして、その地域に再利用された空気を届けた。彼は真の信者で、自分の運命を嘆いたことは一度もなかった。最後の任務で、彼は爆発性のガス管の穴を塞いで、何百人もの労働者を救った。しかし、毒性により心臓麻痺と血毒を起こした」
languages.original_text: {n}Finally, Eogunn touches the voidborn youth.{/n} "Mikosh, a ventilation shaft crawler from Sorting Hub 10. He dutifully burned void polyps and vermin, and would be the first to climb into blocked ducts, risking his life to deliver recycled air into the sector. He was a true believer and never lamented his lot. On his final foray, he saved hundreds of workers by using his body to plug a hole in a combustible gas pipe. The toxicity led to cardiac arrest and blood poisoning."

traits.locale_text: {n}最後に、エオグンは虚空の生まれた青年に触れる。{n}「ミコシュ、ソートハブ10の換気口の掃除人。彼は虚空のポリプや害虫を忠実に焼いて、詰まったダクトに真っ先に登り、命を危険にさらして、その地域に再利用された空気を届けた。彼は真の信者で、自分の運命を嘆いたことは一度もなかった。最後の任務で、彼は爆発性のガス管の穴を塞いで、何百人もの労働者を救った。しかし、毒性により心臓麻痺と血毒を起こした。」

languages.text: {n}最后，伊奥贡碰了碰那名年轻的虚空之子。{/n}“米科什，10号分拣站的通风井爬行工。他尽职尽责地焚烧霉菌与害虫，总是第一个爬进堵塞的管道，冒着生命危险为舱区输送循环空气。他是一名真正的信徒，从不怨天尤人。在他的最后一次行动中，他用自己的身体堵住了可燃气体管道的破洞，拯救了数百名工人。毒气引发了心脏骤停与败血症。”
languages.original_text: {n}Finally, Eogunn touches the voidborn youth.{/n} "Mikosh, a ventilation shaft crawler from Sorting Hub 10. He dutifully burned mouldslime and vermin, and would be the first to climb into blocked ducts, risking his life to deliver recycled air into the sector. He was a true believer and never lamented his lot. On his final foray, he saved hundreds of workers by using his body to plug a hole in a combustible gas pipe. The toxicity led to cardiac arrest and blood poisoning."

traits.locale_text: {n}最后，伊奥贡碰了碰那名年轻的虚空之子。{/n}“米科什，10号分拣站的通风井爬行工。他尽职尽责地焚烧霉菌与害虫，总是第一个爬进堵塞的管道，冒着生命危险为舱区输送循环空气。他是一名真正的信徒，从不怨天尤人。在他的最后一次行动中，他用自己的身体堵住了可燃气体管道的破洞，拯救了数百名工人。毒气引发了心脏骤停与败血症。”

languages.text: {n}Por fin, Eogunn toca al joven nacido en el vacío.{/n} «Mikosh, un reptador de los conductos de ventilación del nexo de clasificación 10. Incineraba con diligencia el limo mohoso y las alimañas, y era el primero en aventurarse en los conductos bloqueados, poniendo en peligro su vida para asegurar el flujo de aire reciclado en el sector. Era un verdadero creyente y nunca se lamentó por su posición. En su última inspección, salvó a cientos de trabajadores sacrificando su cuerpo para taponar un agujero en una tubería de gas combustible. La toxicidad le provocó el paro cardíaco y el envenenamiento de su sangre».
languages.original_text: {n}Finally, Eogunn touches the voidborn youth.{/n} "Mikosh, a ventilation shaft crawler from Sorting Hub 10. He dutifully burned mouldslime and vermin, and would be the first to climb into blocked ducts, risking his life to deliver recycled air into the sector. He was a true believer and never lamented his lot. On his final foray, he saved hundreds of workers by using his body to plug a hole in a combustible gas pipe. The toxicity led to cardiac arrest and blood poisoning."

traits.locale_text: {n}Por fin, Eogunn toca al joven nacido en el vacío.{/n} «Mikosh, un reptador de los conductos de ventilación del nexo de clasificación 10. Incineraba con diligencia el limo mohoso y las alimañas, y era el primero en aventurarse en los conductos bloqueados, poniendo en peligro su vida para asegurar el flujo de aire reciclado en el sector. Era un verdadero creyente y nunca se lamentó por su posición. En su última inspección, salvó a cientos de trabajadores sacrificando su cuerpo para taponar un agujero en una tubería de gas combustible. La toxicidad le provocó el paro cardíaco y el envenenamiento de su sangre».

languages.text: {n}Schließlich berührt Eogunn das jugendliche Kind der Leere.{/n} "Mikosh, ein Schachtkriecher aus Sortierstation 10. Er hat pflichtgetreu Schimmelschleim und Ungeziefer verbrannt und war stets der Erste, der in verstopfte Rohre kroch, um den Sektor unter Einsatz seines Lebens mit Frischluft zu versorgen. Er war ein wahrer Gläubiger und hat nie über sein Schicksal geklagt. Bei seinem letzten Einsatz rettete er Hunderte von Arbeitern, als er mit seinem Körper ein Leck in einer Gasleitung abdichtete. Das toxische Gas führte zu einem Herzstillstand und einer Blutvergiftung."
languages.original_text: {n}Finally, Eogunn touches the voidborn youth.{/n} "Mikosh, a ventilation shaft crawler from Sorting Hub 10. He dutifully burned mouldslime and vermin, and would be the first to climb into blocked ducts, risking his life to deliver recycled air into the sector. He was a true believer and never lamented his lot. On his final foray, he saved hundreds of workers by using his body to plug a hole in a combustible gas pipe. The toxicity led to cardiac arrest and blood poisoning."

traits.locale_text: {n}Schließlich berührt Eogunn das jugendliche Kind der Leere.{/n} "Mikosh, ein Schachtkriecher aus Sortierstation 10. Er hat pflichtgetreu Schimmelschleim und Ungeziefer verbrannt und war stets der Erste, der in verstopfte Rohre kroch, um den Sektor unter Einsatz seines Lebens mit Frischluft zu versorgen. Er war ein wahrer Gläubiger und hat nie über sein Schicksal geklagt. Bei seinem letzten Einsatz rettete er Hunderte von Arbeitern, als er mit seinem Körper ein Leck in einer Gasleitung abdichtete. Das toxische Gas führte zu einem Herzstillstand und einer Blutvergiftung."

languages.text: {n}Enfin, Eogunn touche le jeune hors-monde.{/n} « Mikosh, un nettoyeur de ventilation dans la zone de tri numéro 10. Il brûlait consciencieusement la vermine et les moisissures, et il n'hésitait jamais à risquer sa vie en grimpant dans les conduits bloqués pour assurer la circulation de l'air recyclé dans le secteur. C'était un croyant pur et dur qui ne se plaignait jamais de son sort. Lors de sa dernière journée de travail, il a sauvé des centaines d'ouvriers en utilisant son propre corps pour boucher un trou dans un tuyau de gaz combustible, dont la toxicité a entraîné un arrêt cardiaque et une septicémie. »
languages.original_text: {n}Finally, Eogunn touches the voidborn youth.{/n} "Mikosh, a ventilation shaft crawler from Sorting Hub 10. He dutifully burned mouldslime and vermin, and would be the first to climb into blocked ducts, risking his life to deliver recycled air into the sector. He was a true believer and never lamented his lot. On his final foray, he saved hundreds of workers by using his body to plug a hole in a combustible gas pipe. The toxicity led to cardiac arrest and blood poisoning."

traits.locale_text: {n}Enfin, Eogunn touche le jeune hors-monde.{/n} « Mikosh, un nettoyeur de ventilation dans la zone de tri numéro 10. Il brûlait consciencieusement la vermine et les moisissures, et il n'hésitait jamais à risquer sa vie en grimpant dans les conduits bloqués pour assurer la circulation de l'air recyclé dans le secteur. C'était un croyant pur et dur qui ne se plaignait jamais de son sort. Lors de sa dernière journée de travail, il a sauvé des centaines d'ouvriers en utilisant son propre corps pour boucher un trou dans un tuyau de gaz combustible, dont la toxicité a entraîné un arrêt cardiaque et une septicémie. »

languages.text: {n}Son olarak Eogunn, uçsuzdoğan gence dokunuyor.{/n} "Mikosh, 10. Tasnif Merkezi'nden gelme bir havalandırma borusu sakini. Küf balçığını ve haşerelerini görev bilinciyle yakmış. Tıkanmış kanallara ilk tırmanmış, sektöre geri dönüştürülmüş hava sağlamak için hayatını riske atmış. Gerçek bir inananmış ve hiçbir zaman kaderinden şikâyet etmemiş. Son vazifesinde, yanıcı bir gaz borusundaki deliği bedeniyle tıkayarak yüzlerce işçiyi kurtarmış. Toksisite, kalp krizine ve kan zehirlenmesine yol açmış."
languages.original_text: {n}Finally, Eogunn touches the voidborn youth.{/n} "Mikosh, a ventilation shaft crawler from Sorting Hub 10. He dutifully burned mouldslime and vermin, and would be the first to climb into blocked ducts, risking his life to deliver recycled air into the sector. He was a true believer and never lamented his lot. On his final foray, he saved hundreds of workers by using his body to plug a hole in a combustible gas pipe. The toxicity led to cardiac arrest and blood poisoning."
